{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Housekeeper",
  "description": "Carlson Hotel&nbsp;is a four-star hotel located inside Osborne Phase 2,&nbsp;Ikoyi with 22 rooms, swimming and a gym.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Housekeeper

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities


	Linens &amp; Amenities:&nbsp;Change bed linens, replace used towels, and restock toiletries and amenities (e.g., soap, shampoo).
	Public Areas:&nbsp;Maintain cleanliness in corridors, lobbies, elevators, and other public areas.
	Guest Requests:&nbsp;Respond promptly to guest requests for extra items like pillows, towels, or other supplies.
	Inspection &amp; Reporting:&nbsp;Report any maintenance issues (e.g., broken lamps, clogged drains) or safety hazards to supervisors immediately.
	Stock Management:&nbsp;Maintain organized cleaning carts, laundry, and inventory of cleaning supplies.
	Room Cleaning:&nbsp;Deep clean guest rooms, including dusting, vacuuming, mopping, polishing, and sanitizing all surfaces.
	Bathroom Maintenance:&nbsp;Thoroughly sanitize toilets, sinks, bathtubs, and showers, and polish mirrors.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE qualification with 3 years of experience.


Salary
N70,000 / Month.

Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Resume to:&nbsp;info@carlson-hotel.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note:&nbsp;For more information WhatsApp&nbsp;09086370687.",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-24",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-01",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",
  "hiringOrganization": {
    "@type": "Organization",
    "name": "Carlson Hotel"
    
  },

Housekeeper Job at Carlson Hotel




        
    

        
        Carlson Hotel is a four-star hotel located inside Osborne Phase 2, Ikoyi with 22 rooms, swimming and a gym.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Housekeeper

Job Location: Ikoyi, Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Responsibilities
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Linens & Amenities: Change bed linens, replace used towels, and restock toiletries and amenities (e.g., soap, shampoo).
	Public Areas: Maintain cleanliness in corridors, lobbies, elevators, and other public areas.
	Guest Requests: Respond promptly to guest requests for extra items like pillows, towels, or other supplies.
	Inspection & Reporting: Report any maintenance issues (e.g., broken lamps, clogged drains) or safety hazards to supervisors immediately.
	Stock Management: Maintain organized cleaning carts, laundry, and inventory of cleaning supplies.
	Room Cleaning: Deep clean guest rooms, including dusting, vacuuming, mopping, polishing, and sanitizing all surfaces.
	Bathroom Maintenance: Thoroughly sanitize toilets, sinks, bathtubs, and showers, and polish mirrors.


Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an SSCE qualification with 3 years of experience.


Salary
N70,000 / Month.

Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should submit their Resume to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tracking Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Calabar - Cross River and Lago



Qualifications


	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor&#39;s Degree with 2 years experience.




Benefits


	Salary Range: N150,000 &ndash; N500,000 monthly (commensurate with experience).
	Relocation Support: Accommodation will be provided for up to six (6) months for successful candidates willing to relocate.




Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Curriculum Vitae (CV)&nbsp;to:&nbsp;ubokutomedetakpan2054@gmail.com
Copy:&nbsp;bechemventures@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

Tracking Officer Job at Bechem Ventures Limited




        
    

        
        Bechem Ventures Limited - Our client, a reputable haulage organization with operations in Calabar and Lagos is currently recruiting qualified and experienced professionals, to fill the position below:



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Tracking Officer

Job Location: Calabar - Cross River and Lago



Qualifications
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	Interested candidates should possess an HND / Bachelor's Degree with 2 years experience.




Benefits


	Salary Range: N150,000 – N500,000 monthly (commensurate with experience).
	Relocation Support: Accommodation will be provided for up to six (6) months for successful candidates willing to relocate.




Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their Curriculum Vitae (CV) to: [email protected]
Copy: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.

Note: Only shortlisted candidates will be contacted.

    

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Personal Assistant",
  "description": "Abuja Clinics was established in 1989 as a health institution to provide efficient medical services to the then budding Federal Capital Territory (FCT). From humble beginnings it has grown into a group of 3 hospitals located in Karu, Garki and Maitama districts of the FCT . The group possesses advanced medical equipments to assist its team of highly qualified and dedicated health personnels. These equipments include but are not limited to the 128-slice CT scan unit, 4D-Ultrasonography, Mammography unit with stereotatic biopsy and Intra-operative C-arm fluoroscopy allowing for excellent diagnosis and cure. The hospital renders services in all major fields of medicine such as: Surgery, Paediatrics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Internal Medicine, Radiology and Dentistry.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)&nbsp;
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	BSc / HND in Secretarial Administration or Office Management and Technology with 1- 3 years post NYSC experience in executive support to management.
	Must be adept in the use of Microsoft Office Suite
	Must have verbal and written articulacy, professional discretion, efficiency, well-developed time management and strong organizational skills
	Ability to exercise discretion in dealing with confidential or sensitive matters is required.
	Confident and able to work on own initiative with limited supervision.
	Must be a female.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;hr@abujaclinics.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

  "validThrough": "2026-05-25",

  },
  "jobLocation": {

Personal Assistant Job at Abuja Clinics




        
    

        
        Abuja Clinics was established in 1989 as a health institution to provide efficient medical services to the then budding Federal Capital Territory (FCT). From humble beginnings it has grown into a group of 3 hospitals located in Karu, Garki and Maitama districts of the FCT . The group possesses advanced medical equipments to assist its team of highly qualified and dedicated health personnels. These equipments include but are not limited to the 128-slice CT scan unit, 4D-Ultrasonography, Mammography unit with stereotatic biopsy and Intra-operative C-arm fluoroscopy allowing for excellent diagnosis and cure. The hospital renders services in all major fields of medicine such as: Surgery, Paediatrics, Obstetrics and Gynaecology, Internal Medicine, Radiology and Dentistry.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Personal Assistant

Job Location: Abuja (FCT) 
Employment Type: Full-time

Requirements


	BSc / HND in Secretarial Administration or Office Management and Technology with 1- 3 years post NYSC experience in executive support to management.
	Must be adept in the use of Microsoft Office Suite
	Must have verbal and written articulacy, professional discretion, efficiency, well-developed time management and strong organizational skills
	Ability to exercise discretion in dealing with confidential or sensitive matters is required.
	Confident and able to work on own initiative with limited supervision.
	Must be a female.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.    

    

        Click here to Apply  
        

    
     




        
        

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
